name: session-engine
author: Christian Paul (https://github.com/cpauldev)
description: SessionEngine is a browser session and cache lifecycle toolkit for TypeScript applications that need TTL storage, ownership validation, cross-tab logout sync, and auth-aware fetch handling.

scripts.test:smoke: bun -e "const mod = await import('./dist/index.js'); for (const key of ['SessionEngine','createStorageCache','createAuthFetch','getFromStorage','saveToStorage']) { if (typeof mod[key] !== 'function') throw new Error('Missing export: ' + key); }"
